song.title: Nails in Your Hands
song.author: Richard Cimino
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D The nails in Your hands . Bm The nail in Your feet . G A They tell me how much You love me; . D The thorns on Your brow .Bm They tell me how . G A You bore so much pain to love me.
[C] . F#m G And when the heavens pass away, . F#m G All Your scars will still remain, . F#m G And forever they will say . Em A How much You love me.
[B] .D Forever my love, . Bm Forever my heart, . G A Forever my life is Yours.
